Module com.github.cowwoc.requirements.java
Package com.github.cowwoc.requirements.java.internal.extension

Class AbstractFloatingPointVerifier<S,V extends ExtensibleFloatingPointValidator<V,T>,T extends Number & Comparable<? super T>>

java.lang.Object
com.github.cowwoc.requirements.java.internal.extension.AbstractObjectVerifier<S,V,T>
com.github.cowwoc.requirements.java.internal.extension.AbstractComparableVerifier<S,V,T>
com.github.cowwoc.requirements.java.internal.extension.AbstractNumberVerifier<S,V,T>
com.github.cowwoc.requirements.java.internal.extension.AbstractFloatingPointVerifier<S,V,T>
Type Parameters:
S - the type of verifier returned by the methods
V - the type of validator used by the verifier
T - the type of the value being validated
All Implemented Interfaces:
ExtensibleComparableVerifier<S,T>, ExtensibleFloatingPointVerifier<S,T>, ExtensibleNumberVerifier<S,T>, ExtensibleObjectVerifier<S,T>
Direct Known Subclasses:
DoubleVerifierImpl, FloatVerifierImpl, PrimitiveDoubleVerifierImpl, PrimitiveFloatVerifierImpl
public abstract class AbstractFloatingPointVerifier<S,V extends ExtensibleFloatingPointValidator<V,T>,T extends Number & Comparable<? super T>> extends AbstractNumberVerifier<S,V,T> implements ExtensibleFloatingPointVerifier<S,T>
Default implementation of ExtensibleFloatingPointVerifier.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    S
    isFinite()
    Ensures that the actual value is finite.
    S
    isNotFinite()
    Ensures that the actual value is not finite.
    S
    isNotNumber()
    Ensures that the actual value is not a number.
    S
    isNumber()
    Ensures that the actual value is a number.
